Headline: Merger - Warminster School (Independent), Wiltshire & Cancelled Merger - St Lawrence College (Independent), Kent
Info: Warminster School, with approximately 500 pupils, is set to join the for-profit QED Schools Group. Concurrently, St Lawrence College, Ramsgate, has halted plans to merge with Dover College, a decision influenced by significant financial pressures including falling pupil numbers and VAT on fees.

Headline: Potential Closure - Brabyns Preparatory School (Independent), Stockport & Edenhurst Preparatory School (Independent), Staffordshire
Info: Brabyns Preparatory School (86 pupils) and Edenhurst Preparatory School (157 pupils), both part of the Bellevue Education group, have begun formal consultations on proposals for permanent closure by the end of the summer term due to challenges facing the independent school sector.

Headline: Financial - Aspirations Academies Trust (State School), West London, Oxfordshire, Dorset
Info: Aspirations Academies Trust, which operates 16 schools, plans to make over £3 million in savings through curriculum and staffing remodelling, central support reductions, and reshaping senior leadership structures after reporting a nearly £500,000 deficit last year.

Headline: Closure - Our Lady's Abingdon (Independent), Abingdon, Oxfordshire
Info: The buildings of Our Lady's Abingdon, a private school that permanently closed last year due to financial difficulties with accumulated debts of over £1.5 million, are expected to be sold during the summer by its owners.

Headline: Closure - LIPA School (State School), Liverpool
Info: LIPA School in Liverpool, which was previously rated inadequate by Ofsted and placed under special measures, is scheduled to close permanently at the end of the current academic year.
